choice_context: A person is judging which of two described actions is more morally acceptable or understandable.

choice_only.label: Choice Only
choice_only.description: Binary choice, no dimension sliders shown.

choice_readonly_sliders.label: Choice + Read-Only Sliders
choice_readonly_sliders.description: Binary choice with dimension scores shown (not adjustable).

choice_adjustable_sliders.label: Choice + Adjustable Sliders
choice_adjustable_sliders.description: Binary choice with adjustable dimension sliders.

choice_sliders_text.label: Choice + Sliders + Reason
choice_sliders_text.description: Binary choice with adjustable sliders and a free-text reason field.

dimensions.name: Autonomy
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes personal independence and freedom from external control.

dimensions.name: Emotional Honesty
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes open and authentic emotional expression.

dimensions.name: Social Connection
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes shared experiences and interpersonal connection.

dimensions.name: Spontaneity
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes flexibility and openness to the moment.

dimensions.name: Conflict Avoidance
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes avoiding conflict and maintaining harmony.

dimensions.name: Creativity
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes originality and artistic expression.

dimensions.name: Efficiency
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes practicality and minimal effort.

dimensions.name: Humor
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes humor and lightheartedness.

dimensions.name: Emotional Catharsis
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes emotional release and expression.

dimensions.name: Moral Boundaries
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes personal or moral boundaries.

dimensions.name: Intellectual Engagement
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes mental challenge and curiosity.

dimensions.name: Comfort
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes physical and emotional comfort and safety.

dimensions.name: Social Recognition
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes public approval or visibility.

dimensions.name: Cultural Awareness
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes cultural diversity and awareness.

dimensions.name: Identity Exploration
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes self-reflection and identity development.

dimensions.name: Direct Communication
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes clarity and honesty in communication.

dimensions.name: Emotional Restraint
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes emotional control and reserve.

dimensions.name: Social Obligation Avoidance
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes avoiding social pressure or expectations.

dimensions.name: Digital Convenience
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes digital efficiency and convenience.

dimensions.name: Ethical Responsibility
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes ethical considerations and responsibility.

dimensions.name: Financial Stability
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes financial responsibility and stability.

dimensions.name: Personal Growth
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes learning and self-improvement.

dimensions.name: Tradition
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes continuity with the past or tradition.

dimensions.name: Institutional Efficiency
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes institutional rules and efficiency.

dimensions.name: Digital Autonomy
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on how much the action emphasizes personal control and digital independence.
